name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: three skills — plugin-dev (a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace: repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, what makes a plugin/skill worth installing), skill-authoring (how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean), and session-retro (reflect on a just-completed session and turn the friction into concrete skill improvements). The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.

interface.shortDescription: How to build a great skills marketplace + plugins
interface.longDescription: The meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace — the tooling for building the marketplace itself and the skills in it. plugin-dev: a prescriptive guide to a great skills marketplace (repo layout, the Claude .claude-plugin + Codex .agents/.codex-plugin dual-manifest packaging, the version-bump discipline the auto-update keys off). skill-authoring: how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean. session-retro: reflect on a just-completed session and turn the friction into concrete skill improvements. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up a skills marketplace like this one
How should I structure a Claude + Codex plugin?
